fetch_primary.title: Brookfield Dairy Records Collection accession history
fetch_primary.content: Accession note 1 states that the Brookfield Dairy Records Collection began in the cooperative creamery office on Meadow Road. It moved to the present repository in 1998; the note gives no reason for the move.
